arguments.title: HomeRail 0.2.0 Release Notes
arguments.summary: The complete release snapshot is ready.

changes.title: Declarative plugin cards
changes.detail: Pure-data packages can project semantic UI through the shared renderer DSL.

changes.title: Deterministic HRP packages
changes.detail: Package bytes and locks are stable across repeated builds.

changes.title: Portable fallback summaries
changes.detail: Every release-note node remains readable without its rich renderer.
